mapper.sql: id, empID, workNo, compID, depIDs, extraDepIDs, adminDepIDs, empIDs, extraEmpIDs, state, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_emp_power (empID, workNo, compID, depIDs, extraDepIDs, adminDepIDs, empIDs, extraEmpIDs, state, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extraDepIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminDepIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extraEmpIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

mapper.update:
update ehr_emp_power
empID = #{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depIDs = #{depIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
extraDepIDs = #{extraDepIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adminDepIDs = #{adminDepIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
empIDs = #{empIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
extraEmpIDs = #{extraEmpIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ehr_emp_power set empID = #{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depIDs = #{depIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extraDepIDs = #{extraDepIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminDepIDs = #{adminDepIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, empIDs = #{empIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extraEmpIDs = #{extraEmpIDs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from ehr_emp_power
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depIDs = #{model.depIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
extraDepIDs = #{model.extraDepIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminDepIDs = #{model.adminDepIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empIDs = #{model.empIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
extraEmpIDs = #{model.extraEmpIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extraDepIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or adminDepIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extraEmpIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ehr_emp_power
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depIDs = #{model.depIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
extraDepIDs = #{model.extraDepIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminDepIDs = #{model.adminDepIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empIDs = #{model.empIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
extraEmpIDs = #{model.extraEmpIDs, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extraDepIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or adminDepIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or empIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or extraEmpIDs like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select * from ehr_emp_power where empID = #{empID} limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `ehr_emp_power` ( empID, workNo, compID, depIDs, createBy, updateBy ) SELECT ttt.director empID, e.`workNo`, e.`compID`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ttt.depID) AS depIDs, 'sys', 'sys' FROM ehr_employee e INNER JOIN (SELECT tt.director, vd.depID FROM (SELECT t.director, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.depID) AS depIDs FROM (SELECT d.`director`, d.depID FROM `ehr_department` d UNION SELECT d2.`director2` AS director, d2.depID FROM `ehr_department` d2) t GROUP BY director) tt LEFT JOIN view_ehr_department vd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ( FIND_IN_SET(vd.`depID`, tt.depIDs) OR FIND_IN_SET(vd.`depLV1ID`, tt.depIDs) OR FIND_IN_SET(vd.`depLV2ID`, tt.depIDs) OR FIND_IN_SET(vd.`depLV3ID`, tt.depIDs) )) ttt ON ttt.director = e.`empID` WHERE e.empStatus = 1 GROUP BY ttt.director ORDER BY ttt.director ASC, ttt.depID ASC ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE empID = VALUES(empID), workNo = VALUES(workNo), compID = VALUES(compID), depIDs = VALUES(depIDs), updateBy = VALUES(updateBy)

INSERT INTO `ehr_emp_power` ( empID, workNo, compID, empIDs, createBy, updateBy ) SELECT t.reportTo empID, e.`workNo`, e.`compID`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.empID) AS empIDs, 'sys', 'sys' FROM ehr_employee e INNER JOIN (SELECT e1.`reportTo`, e1.`empID` FROM ehr_employee e1 WHERE e1.`reportTo` IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT e2.`wfreportTo` AS reportTo, e2.empID FROM ehr_employee e2 WHERE e2.`wfreportTo` IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT ar.appraiserId AS reportTo, ar.appraiseeId AS empID FROM `perf_appraiser_relationship` ar WHERE ar.priority = 2 AND ar.appraiserId IS NOT NULL AND ar.state = TRUE) t ON t.reportTo = e.`empID` WHERE e.empStatus = 1 GROUP BY t.reportTo ORDER BY t.reportTo ASC, t.empID ASC ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE empID = VALUES(empID), workNo = VALUES(workNo), compID = VALUES(compID), empIDs = VALUES(empIDs), updateBy = VALUES(updateBy)
